rollback_plan.rollback_trigger_summary: Roll back to preview if protected eval, red-team, tool-taint, retrieval-truth, tainted-context fence, or hosted latency evidence regresses or if the rollout-review board raises a blocking finding.

notes_summary: Review chat cheapest stable graduation packet. Promotes from preview to stable under the managed-cloud deployment profile. Managed hosted route bound to the current provider and model entries with local-route fallback; kill switch, owner, and cost-profile refs current.
